programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Charlotte and Lucy hope to impress their rivals with their quirky decor at Acqua Beach in Weymouth. But guest Derek upsets Charlotte with his comments on her design choices.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Derek and Lynne Love are all about keeping it simple at the Langmead Guest House in Ramsgate. But Charlotte and Lucy are mortified to find moths in the bed.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Adam and Susan host at their unconventional B&B, The Big Green Bus, in Lewes, where their guests are shocked to discover that they'll be spending the night on a converted double-decker.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: The last visit of the week is to The Pheasant in Brill, Buckinghamshire, where fur flies as host and chef Stephen Orr reveals that he hasn't been entirely honest with his guests.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: It's the final day of the competition and the B&Bers meet for the last time to find out how much they've been paid and to settle some scores, before the winner is announced.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me Christmas
programs.desc: In this festive celebrity special, Rav Wilding hosts a not-very-Christmassy Mexican night for Rebecca Adlington, Jennifer Ellison, Alex Carter and SuperScrimpers' Mrs Moneypenny.
